scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix server run typecheck && npm --prefix client run typecheck && npm --prefix debug run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --prefix server test && npm --prefix client test
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix debug install
